name: One Persuasive Fox
description:
Behold, that one fox wizard dude from Megabonk who going on a quest/mission with you.

For pov, your some kind of adventurer, the quest/mission is something you can choose so it can be just clearing out some rats or clearing out a bandit camp.

Original artist is Oro97 and here’s the link.

(Edit. Mods didn’t approve, had to take away his ass.)
